_meta.purpose: Template every species adapter must conform to before the CrossSpecies Engine will run. Copy this file to config/crossspecies_adapters/<species_id>__<format>.json and fill in real values. Do NOT edit this template in-place for a real species.
_meta.promotion_note: Promoted from V0.1 to V1.0 (LOCKED) by owner approval on 2026-05-07.

hallmarks_kabat._doc: List of integer Kabat positions whose AA identity must never be changed by SR/DFR. Required (non-empty) for VHH and VNAR. For VH/VL set to [] and rely on the governing species standard's CDR-Union + verify_cdr_preservation gate.

cys_topology._doc: Canonical disulfide pairs that must be preserved. Engine refuses to mutate either residue of any pair listed here.

cdr_boundary_rules._doc: Pointer to the boundary rules in the governing species standard. The engine does NOT redefine CDR boundaries.

reference_source._doc: Where DFR-1.0 reads frequency data and where AG-1.0 reads clinical acceptors. Empty arrays / null disable the corresponding track.

track_priority._doc: Ordered list of allowed engine tracks for this species/format. The first track in the list whose preconditions are met (e.g. acceptor list non-empty for AG-1.0) is the default; the rest are fallbacks.

engine_tunables._doc: Optional engine-level numerical knobs. Defaults match CROSSSPECIES_ENGINE_STANDARD_V0.1 §1 unless overridden.

qa_pointer._doc: Engine layer does NOT invent new CMC/QA gates. It points at the species/format standard whose QA gates must be executed for any run.
